== Notes for [[Item:Q117525|Q117525]] ==

Freire, Anselmo Braancamp. Brasões da Sala de Sintra. Univ. de Coimbra. 2ª Ed. Coimbra, 1921. Vol I, p. 351.


*

References

https://www.familysearch.org/tree/person/memories/KLY1-W4C

https://www.familysearch.org/tree/person/sources/KLY1-W4C

https://www.familysearch.org/tree/pedigree/portrait/KLY1-W4C

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
